46.reason: [After the previous loop, i is dot (out of bounds). Should use v instead of i to clear the deleted vertex's adjacency list.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [After the previous loop, i is dot (out of bounds). Should use v instead of i to clear the deleted vertex's adjacency list.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: variable i is out of scope (i is from previous loop and equals dot), should use v instead of i to clear the deleted vertex's adjacency list]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Variable 'i' is out of scope (its value is 'dot' from the previous loop); should be 'G[v][j]=9999' to clear vertex v's own adjacency list]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect index i (value of dot after loop); should be G[v][j]=9999; to clear v's adjacency list]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Logic error. The variable 'i' retains its value from the previous loop (equal to 'dot'), so this modifies G[dot][j] instead of G[v][j]. It should be G[v][j]=9999; to correctly mark edges connected to the deleted vertex.]
